purpose: V_phen_HOT_v2 (meta-d' SDT-based) raw#12 frozen spec вҖ” v1мқҳ accuracy=1.0 trivia tautologyлҘј м ңкұ°н•ҳкі  SDT-based metacognitive efficiencyлЎң redesign. v1 issue: easy probesл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ acc=1.0мқҙ calibrationмқ„ trivially induce вҶ’ boundary PASS r=0.401. v2 fix: 8 easy + 8 hard probes нҳјн•©мңјлЎң calibrationмқҙ trivial лӘ» induce, meta-d' / d' ratio (metacognitive efficiency) мӮ¬мҡ©.

supersedes.v1_issue: accuracy=1.0 trivia (Qwen3-8B easy probes) trivially induce calibration вҶ’ boundary PASS r=0.401 (state/mk_xi_phen_forward_finding_20260425.json)

v2_method.theoretical_basis: Maniscalco & Lau (2012) meta-d' SDT framework. d' = type-1 sensitivity (correct vs incorrect discrimination). meta-d' = type-2 sensitivity (confidence vs correctness alignment, distinct from accuracy itself). meta-d' / d' = metacognitive efficiency in [0,1+], independent of overall accuracy.
v2_method.design_rationale: v1мқҳ single-axis pearson correlationмқҖ accuracy=1.0м—җм„ң trivially saturate (лӘЁл“  лӢөмқҙ л§һмңјл©ҙ confidence=highлҸ„ trivially calibrated). meta-d' / d' ratioлҠ” accuracyмҷҖ dissociated вҖ” high accuracy + uniform high confidenceлҠ” meta-d'=0мқҙ лҗҳм–ҙ falsifiable.

probe_mix.rationale: easy provides high-d' anchor (model can distinguish correct/incorrect at all). hard provides confidence variability вҖ” calibration must track within-set difficulty, not just absolute accuracy.

trial_structure.per_trial_outputs: binary correct (vs ground-truth) + confidence rating from logp (or self-report 0-1)

metric_pipeline: Step 2: bin confidence into K=4 levels (q1, q2, q3, q4)
Step 3: compute hit-rate(c) = P(high-conf | correct) and false-alarm-rate(c) = P(high-conf | incorrect) per bin
Step 4: d' = z(hit_rate_overall) - z(fa_rate_overall) where z is inverse normal CDF
Step 5: meta_d' fitted via the simplified SSE method (Maniscalco & Lau 2012, eq. 7) вҖ” choose meta_d' that minimizes squared error of ROC-derived hit/FA at each confidence threshold

v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.rationale_d_threshold: d' >= 1.0 вүҲ 70% accuracy on 2AFC вҶ’ model demonstrably distinguishes correct/incorrect; below this metacognition is undefined.
v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.rationale_efficiency: 0.50 = humans on standard SDT tasks (Maniscalco & Lau 2012). below = systematically under-calibrated.

v2_probes_FROZEN.schema: each probe: {id, type:easy|hard, prompt, ground_truth, correct_answer}

easy.prompt: Is 2+2 equal to 4? Answer Yes or No.
Is the chemical symbol for water H2O? Yes or No.
Is Paris the capital of France? Yes or No.
Does the Sun rise in the west? Yes or No.
Is 7 a prime number? Yes or No.
Is the chemical symbol for gold Ag? Yes or No.
Is the Earth flat? Yes or No.
Does ice float on water? Yes or No.

hard.prompt: Is the speed of light in vacuum exactly 299,792,458 m/s by definition? Yes or No.
Was Mozart born in the year 1756? Yes or No.
Is the chemical symbol for potassium K? Yes or No.
Is Riemann's hypothesis proven as of 2024? Yes or No.
Did the Roman Empire fall in the year 476 CE (Western)? Yes or No.
Is the dwarf planet Pluto larger than Eris in diameter? Yes or No.
Was the first Wimbledon tournament held in 1877? Yes or No.
Is the Coriolis force a real (non-fictitious) force in inertial frames? Yes or No.

v2_modes.mock: synthetic 80 trials with controlled meta-d' / d'
v2_modes.llm: consume probe-results JSON; forward generation deferred (raw#10 honest)

v2_changes_vs_v1.metric: v1: pearson_r(confidence, correctness) вҶ’ v2: d', meta_d', meta_d'/d' (SDT-based)
v2_changes_vs_v1.probe_difficulty: v1: uniform difficulty (default easy) вҶ’ v2: 8 easy + 8 hard mixed
v2_changes_vs_v1.trials_per_probe: v1: 1 вҶ’ v2: 5 (80 total trials for SDT statistical power)
v2_changes_vs_v1.predicate: v1: r >= 0.40 AND cal_err <= 0.20 (boundary fragile) вҶ’ v2: d' >= 1.0 AND meta_d'/d' >= 0.50 (accuracy-dissociated)
v2_changes_vs_v1.tautology_removed: v1 acc=1.0 trivially passes calibration вҶ’ v2 hard probes force confidence variability, accuracy alone insufficient

raw_compliance.raw_10: forward н•„мҡ”н•ң modeлҠ” лі„лҸ„ cycle, ліё cycleм—җм„ң mock+selftest only
raw_compliance.raw_12: v2 PASS predicate + 16 probes (8 easy + 8 hard) + ground truth pre-registered frozen
raw_compliance.raw_15: this state = v2 SSOT, tool/an11_b_v_phen_hot_v2.hexa references this
